displayTitle: Insider: Rebellion: The Story of Rogue One and Andor
synopsis: Star Wars Insider: Rebellion: The Story of Rogue One and Andor is a special edition from Star Wars Insider in honor of the tenth anniversary of Rogue One: A Star Wars Story. A deluxe hardcover collection drawn from interviews and features from Star Wars Insider. Covering the making of Rogue One: A Star Wars Story and Andor, the book celebrates the 10th anniversary of the Star Wars spin-off movie and subsequent TV series. The in-depth companion to the hit 2016 feature film Rogue One: A Star Wars Story and linked Disney+ series, Andor. This deluxe collector's edition explores the making of both projects through interviews with cast members and crew, including Kathleen Kennedy, Gareth Edwards, John Knoll, John Gilroy, Felicity Jones, Ben Mendelsohn, Genevieve O'Reilly, Stellan Skarsgard, Riz Ahmed, Forest Whitaker, and more. Featuring a plot synopsis for each individual episode of Andor and for Rogue One, and illustrated with incredible photos and concept art, the book examines the characters and themes of both productions and their impact on the Star Wars galaxy
title: Star Wars Insider: Rebellion: The Story of Rogue One and Andor
